name: definition
description: Formal term definition component — displays a term with its definition in a structured format
whenToUse: Use to formally define a term the reader may not know. Place at first use of a specialized term in the document.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for general explanations — use Callout. Do not define terms the target reader already knows.
example:
<Definition term="Invariant">
  A condition that holds true before and after every operation on a data structure.
</Definition>
